title: How to round a number to the nearest multiple (5, 10, 0.25...)
task: Round a value to the nearest 5, 10, 25 cents, or any step — not just to decimal places.
keywords: round to nearest multiple google sheets

excel.note: Nearest 5. Use CEILING(A2,5) to always round up, FLOOR(A2,5) down.

explanation: MROUND(number, multiple) rounds to the nearest step. 13 is closer to 15 than to 10, so it rounds to 15. For money, MROUND(x,0.25) snaps to the nearest quarter; CEILING/FLOOR force the direction.
